tasks.label: Git commit and push
tasks.command: git add services.html css/style.css js/app.js && git commit -m "Refactor: move services CSS to stylesheet, semantic article tags, sticky search, smart search count" && git push

tasks.label: Git push services refactor
tasks.command: git add services.html css/style.css js/app.js; git commit -m 'Refactor: move services CSS to stylesheet, semantic article tags, sticky search, smart search count'; git push

tasks.label: Git push via cmd
tasks.command: cmd /c "git add services.html css/style.css js/app.js && git commit -m \"Refactor: services CSS to stylesheet, article tags, sticky+smart search\" && git push"
